languages.text: "Уж не сотворил ли ты Изуверский Интеллект, Эоганн?"
"Eogunn, you didn't actually dare to create an Abominable Intelligence, did you?"

languages.text: "Eogunn, Ihr habt nicht wirklich eine Abscheuliche Intelligenz erschaffen, oder?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you didn't actually dare to create an Abominable Intelligence, did you?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, Ihr habt nicht wirklich eine Abscheuliche Intelligenz erschaffen, oder?"

languages.text: « Rassurez-moi, Eogunn, vous n'avez pas vraiment osé créer une Intelligence Abominable ? »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you didn't actually dare to create an Abominable Intelligence, did you?"

traits.locale_text: « Rassurez-moi, Eogunn, vous n'avez pas vraiment osé créer une Intelligence Abominable ? »

languages.text: “伊奥贡，你该不会真造了个憎恶智能出来吧？”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you didn't actually dare to create an Abominable Intelligence, did you?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，你该不会真造了个憎恶智能出来吧？”

languages.text: «Eogunn, no se habrá atrevido a crear una Inteligencia Abominable, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you didn't actually dare to create an Abominable Intelligence, did you?"

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, no se habrá atrevido a crear una Inteligencia Abominable, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: "エオグン、まさか本当に忌まわしき知性を作り出そうとしたのか？"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, you didn't actually dare to create an Abominable Intelligence, did you?"

languages.text: "Gerçekten bir Yezit Zekâ yaratmaya cüret etmedin, değil mi Eogunn?"
